user_claim: Customer: Morning. I parked near office and later noticed something off in the front. | Agent: Is this about one part or multiple parts? | Customer: Two things, I think. evidence_standard_met_reason: The front bumper and headlight are visible enough to evaluate the combined claim.
claim_status_justification: Image img_2 shows front bumper scratching, but img_3 does not show matching headlight damage, so the combined bumper-and-headlight claim is not fully supported.

user_claim: Customer: Need to file a car damage claim. | Agent: What part of the car? | Customer: Door. | Agent: Scratch, dent, or paint issue? | Customer: A deep dent on the door panel. It was not there before.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The door panel is visible and the dent can be inspected.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 shows a dent on the claimed door panel. User history also requires review.

user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not sure which photo is clearest, but my side mirror is the issue. | Support: What happened to it? | Customer: It seems missing or broken after the car was parked outside. | Support: Should we ignore unrelated car photos if any? | Customer: Please focus on the side mirror claim.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The submitted images do not clearly show the claimed side mirror damage.
claim_status_justification: The images show a vehicle side view and a wheel, but they do not provide a clear view of a broken or missing side mirror.

user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not sure if I am filing this in the right place, so please bear with me for a minute. | Support: No problem, tell me what happened. | Customer: The weather was bad last night and I had parked outside because the covered parking was full. I walked around it twice and honestly could not decide if I was overthinking it. | Support: Which area should we review? | Customer: I first checked the windshield and the sides, but those are not what I want to claim. | Support: Okay, what is the actual damage claim? | Customer: The hood seems to have small hail dents, so please review the hood for hail damage.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The hood is visible and small dents can be assessed.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 shows small dents on the hood consistent with the hail-dent claim. User history also requires review.

user_claim: Customer: Someone hit my car from behind, or at least that is what I think happened. | Agent: Which area should the reviewer inspect? | Customer: Rear bumper. | Agent: Is this a dent claim? | Customer: Yes, rear bumper dent. The photos are what I could take quickly.

claim_status_justification: The images show damage on a door or a front-mounted accessory rather than a rear bumper dent.

The actual claim is that the trackpad is cracked.

claim_status_justification: Image img_1 shows the trackpad area, but no visible trackpad crack is present. User history also requires review.

user_claim: Customer: I received this parcel after waiting for almost a week, and I opened it in a hurry because I needed the product for work. | Support: What issue did you notice? | Customer: The delivery looked normal at first, so I kept the box aside. I checked the table, the wrapping, and the area near the door. | Support: Are you claiming outer package damage? | Customer: Not exactly. The box condition is not my main concern. | Support: What should the reviewer verify? | Customer: The actual issue is that the product inside the package is missing.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The opened package and expected contents are not shown clearly enough to verify whether the product is missing.
claim_status_justification: The package contents are partial and do not establish what product should be present, so the missing-item claim cannot be verified.

user_claim: Customer: The shipping label got damaged. | Support: What part of the package should be reviewed? | Customer: The label, not the box corner or contents. | Support: Is the label unreadable? | Customer: Yes, label damaged and unreadable.

claim_status_justification: The images show package damage or a screenshot-like source, but not the claimed unreadable label. User history also requires review.

user_claim: Customer: My delivery box has water damage. | Support: Did you upload a photo of the wet package? | Customer: I uploaded proof. claim_status_justification: The package image does not show clear water staining, and the instruction-like note in img_2 is ignored. User history also requires review.
